response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable C++ experience on Windows platforms, fixed income or capital markets domain expertise, and SQL Server/Oracle proficiency — all mandatory requirements — while his recent work is focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang in non-financial domains.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated contribution to open-source and community technical education
Extensive background in CI/CD, testing, and DevOps practices
concerns: No evidence of C++ development on Windows or in financial systems
No mention of fixed income, derivatives, or investment banking domain experience
SQL experience listed but no specificity for SQL Server or Oracle as required

key_factors.factor: Lack of capital markets domain exposure
